case_title: PADDY DOHERTY VS. HARRY GLASSMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-03-2020 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOHERTY, PADDY INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS DOHERTY CONSTRUCTION ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-03-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-22-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-03-2020 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOHERTY, PADDY INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS DOHERTY CONSTRUCTION AS TO DEFENDANT GLASSMAN, HARRY BARTEL, PEGGY DOES 1 - 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-22-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-21-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-30-2019
